objective: Record the Function Factory parent-verification dogfood proof in Strategy.Recipes.
prompt: Update docs/product/function-factory-dogfood-evidence.md to add a concise section for Strategy.Recipes PR #71 and the Function Factory PR #44 parent-verification hardening. Mention that PR #71 was merged after parent-environment verification and that Function Factory now reruns requiredCommands after parent commit and before PR publication. Keep the change documentation-only and do not alter app/, server/, packaging/, package implementation, tests, or generated assets. If README.md already points to this evidence doc, do not edit it unless a small clarification is necessary.

context.summary: Function Factory PR #44 hardened the scheduler so parent-observed requiredCommands become first-class result evidence. Strategy.Recipes PR #71 is the latest external workload proof.

acceptanceCriteria: docs/product/function-factory-dogfood-evidence.md records PR #71 as a merged Function Factory dogfood proof.
The evidence doc records the parent-verification hardening from Function Factory PR #44.
The change is documentation-only and stays within the allowed paths.
The scheduler result bundle includes parent verification evidence for the required commands.
